assertions.title: Chip click cycles unset → allow → deny → unset

steps.action: Run assigned vitest suite including PoliciesState.peerChipCycle.test.tsx
Inspect test case 'click cycles unset → allow → deny → unset and dispatches one setPeerPolicyOverride per step'
steps.expected: Explicit coverage of click cycle contract
steps.observed: Test explicitly validates unset→allow→deny→unset sequence and one dispatch per click

assertions.title: clear_policy_overrides resets the entire matrix

steps.action: Run assigned vitest suite (peerChipCycle + defaultPolicyDropdown files)
steps.expected: At least one test explicitly validates clear_policy_overrides() full-matrix reset
steps.observed: No direct test coverage for VAL-POLICIES-009 in the assigned files

steps.action: Search assigned test files for 'VAL-POLICIES-009' and 'clear_policy_overrides'

assertions.issues: Assigned test command did not include a direct clear_policy_overrides validation for VAL-POLICIES-009, so this assertion could not be conclusively validated from available evidence.

assertions.title: Peer Policies chips are keyboard operable

steps.action: Run assigned vitest suite including PoliciesState.peerChipCycle.test.tsx
Inspect test case 'Enter and Space activate the cycle the same as click (VAL-POLICIES-021)'
steps.expected: Keyboard activation coverage for chip interaction
steps.observed: Test explicitly validates Enter/Space activation and matching dispatch behavior

assertions.title: Optimistic UI rolls back on failed override write

steps.action: Run assigned vitest suite including PoliciesState.peerChipCycle.test.tsx
Inspect test case 'rolls back optimistic state and surfaces an inline error when dispatch rejects (VAL-POLICIES-026)'
steps.expected: Rollback and inline error behavior validated
steps.observed: Test explicitly validates rollback to prior state and inline role=status error on dispatch rejection

frictions.description: Validation contract marks these as agent-browser UI assertions with screenshot evidence, but this assignment constrained execution to vitest-only evidence.
frictions.resolution: Recorded deterministic test-run evidence and assertion mapping logs from the assigned vitest command.

blockers.description: No explicit VAL-POLICIES-009/clear_policy_overrides coverage in assigned test files.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Searched assigned test files and dashboard state test directory for 'VAL-POLICIES-009' and 'clear_policy_overrides'; no direct coverage found.

summary: Tested 4 assigned assertions via the required vitest command: 3 passed (VAL-POLICIES-008/021/026) and 1 blocked due missing direct test coverage (VAL-POLICIES-009).
